//: Test-only tsconfig — used by `pnpm tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json` for unit tests that import a module which itself does `import "server-only"`. It extends the project tsconfig and only adds a `paths` mapping that resolves the build-time `server-only` marker (not an installed npm package) to an empty local stub, so `tsx` can load the real module graph. The Next.js build still uses the plain tsconfig.json — this file is never referenced by `next build`.
